scan.Notes: The resent eruption of the S.S. Vallian's core has ejected this navigation beacon into space.

The Valliant was one of the core blockade runners during the Great Solar Conflict. She was finally crippled by a Martian strike force. The strike force disabled engine control, triggering a runaway that created a plasma trail that remains to this day.

tiers.1: The Valiant's core has recently ruptured, despite being stable for the last hundred years.

hail_greeting: Looks like you've completed your training. Well-done, Pilot—welcome to space.

scan.Notes: Outpast
Drones make up the bulk of the automated workforce in the system. They are used from everything from cargo loading to hazardous material handling.
